caveats.summary: Backend now bundled (book-server + embedded Node runtime ship in the .app via the Tauri sidecar). Remaining gate: a signed/notarized `tauri build` + install-through-Tender verification (po-mac; macOS Developer-ID cert).

Audiobook (ffmpeg + python3) and prose-telemetry (python3) are optional features that spawn local tools at request time; they degrade gracefully (clear error) when absent. The core HTTP API is fully self-contained.
